test_queries.query: I was charged twice this month and I want a refund.
How do I update my credit card information?
I cancelled my subscription but was still charged. I need my money back immediately.
I cannot log into my account. I have tried resetting my password but it is not working.
My account has been locked and I need to recover it urgently.
Can I share my account login with my colleague?
The app is not loading and I keep getting a blank screen.
I cannot upload files to the platform. It keeps timing out.
What is your refund policy for premium plan users?
Am I eligible for a refund if I cancel within 3 days of signing up?
I was billed for an enterprise plan but I only signed up for basic. This is unacceptable.
Your system is down and I cannot access any of my data. This is affecting my business.
I want to delete my account and all my data permanently.
Can I downgrade my plan mid-month and get a partial refund?
Why does my invoice show a different amount than what I was quoted?
